title: Suzume
tmdbOverview: Suzume, 17, lost her mother as a little girl. On her way to school, she meets a mysterious young man. But her curiosity unleashes a calamity that endangers the entire population of Japan, and so Suzume embarks on a journey to set things right.
synopsis: Released in 2022, Suzume is a animation, drama and adventure film from Japan. It holds a solid 7.6 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2020s and genre rankings. It carries a PG certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
